## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss hiring needs and process for virtual assistants/executive assistants at Sunward](https://fathom.video/share/my59yvCzn7nrSSa2ZYJayzZLmkCEjX-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel is looking to hire 2 virtual assistants - one researcher profile in the Philippines and one more senior chief of staff type in Latin America (ideally Brazil)](https://fathom.video/share/my59yvCzn7nrSSa2ZYJayzZLmkCEjX-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [The roles will involve research, coordinating with clients, assisting staff, content production, and potentially growing into operational leadership](https://fathom.video/share/my59yvCzn7nrSSa2ZYJayzZLmkCEjX-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Marcel values AI/automation experience, curiosity to learn, good writing skills, and client-facing communication abilities](https://fathom.video/share/my59yvCzn7nrSSa2ZYJayzZLmkCEjX-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Sunward's hiring process involves technical, grammar, behavioral, and final interviews, plus background checks](https://fathom.video/share/my59yvCzn7nrSSa2ZYJayzZLmkCEjX-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)

## Topics

### Candidate Roles and Requirements

  - [Researcher profile in Philippines: SEO, research, copywriting experience preferred](https://fathom.video/share/my59yvCzn7nrSSa2ZYJayzZLmkCEjX-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
  - [Senior chief of staff type in Latin America (ideally Brazil): More experienced, potential to run operations, strong writing and communication](https://fathom.video/share/my59yvCzn7nrSSa2ZYJayzZLmkCEjX-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Both should have curiosity about AI/automation to learn tools like ChatGPT, Anthropic](https://fathom.video/share/my59yvCzn7nrSSa2ZYJayzZLmkCEjX-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Helpful backgrounds: marketing, SEO, writing, program/client management](https://fathom.video/share/my59yvCzn7nrSSa2ZYJayzZLmkCEjX-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)

### Hiring Process and Logistics

  - [2-4 week process with technical, grammar, behavioral interviews](https://fathom.video/share/my59yvCzn7nrSSa2ZYJayzZLmkCEjX-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
  - [Final interviews with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/my59yvCzn7nrSSa2ZYJayzZLmkCEjX-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
  - [Background checks conducted](https://fathom.video/share/my59yvCzn7nrSSa2ZYJayzZLmkCEjX-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Contractors work full-time (40hrs/wk) under Sunward agreement](https://fathom.video/share/my59yvCzn7nrSSa2ZYJayzZLmkCEjX-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
  - [6 month guarantee to replace if needed](https://fathom.video/share/my59yvCzn7nrSSa2ZYJayzZLmkCEjX-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)

### Compensation and Logistics

  - [Philippines: $800-1200/mo for 1-2 yrs experience](https://fathom.video/share/my59yvCzn7nrSSa2ZYJayzZLmkCEjX-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [Latin America: $1200-1500/mo for similar experience](https://fathom.video/share/my59yvCzn7nrSSa2ZYJayzZLmkCEjX-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [One-time 35% fee of annual salary after hire](https://fathom.video/share/my59yvCzn7nrSSa2ZYJayzZLmkCEjX-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [$500 refundable deposit per search location required upfront](https://fathom.video/share/my59yvCzn7nrSSa2ZYJayzZLmkCEjX-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Natalia to send service agreements for Marcel to review](https://fathom.video/share/my59yvCzn7nrSSa2ZYJayzZLmkCEjX-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [Marcel to provide additional role details for job descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/my59yvCzn7nrSSa2ZYJayzZLmkCEjX-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
  - [Pay deposits to initiate searches in both locations after signing agreements](https://fathom.video/share/my59yvCzn7nrSSa2ZYJayzZLmkCEjX-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [Senior Sunward recruiter to follow up and kick off hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/my59yvCzn7nrSSa2ZYJayzZLmkCEjX-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
